The health benefits of Acetosella caprina include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of arthritis due to its high content of antioxidants and flavonoids. The bioactive constituents of this plant include oxalic acid, flavonoids, and vitamins C and A, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
